canonical_question: How do municipal meeting transcripts and hearing audio reveal funded pains?
constraints: Requires multimodal AI capable of processing low-quality municipal audio (Whisper + reasoning model)
Signal extraction accuracy depends on audio quality; municipal recordings vary from professional to phone-mic quality
Open Meetings Act / FOIA protections apply only in US, UK, EU, and Commonwealth jurisdictions
6-12 month lead time means high carrying cost before signal converts to revenue
False positive rate on 'funded pain' detection requires human-in-the-loop validation for first 100+ signals

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs structured data sources (regulatory filings, SEC, FDA databases)
User needs visual/imagery signal sources (satellite, street-level, drone)
